import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    "0"
  end
  let n = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let sum = n * (n + 1) / 2
  print("sum=#{sum}")
  Ok(())
end
